description.en: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.ar: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.br: Causa dano e reduz a velocidade de ataque do alvo por um período de tempo.
description.cns: 对敌人造成持续流血伤害，并降低其攻击速度。
description.de: Den Gegner kontinuierlich durch Blutung für eine bestimmte Zeit Schaden zufügen.
description.fi: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.fil: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.fr: Fait saigner un ennemi, infligeant des dégâts en continu et réduisant sa vitesse d'attaque.
description.id: Memberi damage pada musuh selama periode waktu tertentu dan mengurangi kecepatan serangan mereka.
description.it: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.jp: 一定時間の間、出血による継続的なダメージを与える
description.kr: 일정 시간동안 출혈로 인한 지속적인 대미지를 입히며 공격 속도를 늦춥니다.
description.nl: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.pl: Zadaje wrogowi obrażenia przez pewien czas i zmniejsza jego szybkość ataku.
description.ru: Вы получаете постепенный урон. Скорость атаки снижена.
description.sp: Daña a un enemigo durante un período de tiempo y reduce su velocidad de ataque.
description.sw: You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
description.th: สร้างความเสียหายเลือดไหลแก่ศัตรูในระยะเวลาหนึ่งและลดความเร็วในการโจมตี

description.vi: Gây sát thương lên kẻ địch trong một khoảng thời gian và giảm tốc độ tấn công của chúng.

description.en: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.ar: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.br: Shade é um poderoso deus do medo e da ira, e concede este buff aos jogadores, imbuindo-os com uma rajada de vento que aprimora seus reflexos e permite que se movam mais rápido.
description.cns: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.de: Shade ist ein mächtiger Gott der Angst und des Zorns, der den Spielern diesen Stärkungszauber verleiht, indem er sie mit einem Windstoß ausstattet, der ihre Reflexe verbessert und sie schneller laufen lässt.
description.fi: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.fil: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.fr: Shade est un puissant dieu de la peur et de la rage, et il accorde cet avantage aux joueurs en les imprégnant d'une bourrasque de vent qui améliore leurs réflexes et leur permet de se déplacer plus rapidement.
description.id: Shade adalah dewa ketakutan dan kemarahan yang kuat, dan mereka memberikan buff ini kepada pemain dengan memberi mereka hembusan angin yang meningkatkan refleks mereka dan memungkinkan mereka bergerak lebih cepat.
description.it: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.jp: シェイドは恐怖と怒りの強力な神であり、反射神経を高め、より速く移動できるようにする突風をプレイヤーに吹き込むことで、このバフをプレイヤーに与えます。
description.kr: 쉐이드는 공포와 분노의 강력한 신입니다. 플레이어에게 돌풍을 불어넣어 반사 신경과 이동 속도를 강화하는 버프를 부여합니다.
description.nl: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.pl: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.ru: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.sp: Shade es un poderoso dios del miedo y la rabia, y otorga esta ventaja a los jugadores imbuyéndolos de una ráfaga de viento que mejora sus reflejos y les permite moverse más rápido.
description.sw: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
description.th: Shade เป็นเทพแห่งความกลัวและความโกรธ และพวกมันจะมอบบัฟนี้ให้กับผู้เล่นด้วยการมอบลมพัดพาซึ่งจะช่วยเพิ่มการตอบสนองของผู้เล่นและทำให้พวกเขาเคลื่อนไหวได้เร็วขึ้น
description.tw: 由恐懼之神闇影，賦予的風之祝福，提升玩家的敏捷與移動速度。
description.vi: Shade là một vị thần mạnh mẽ của sự sợ hãi và thịnh nộ, và họ ban sức mạnh này cho người chơi bằng cách truyền cho họ một luồng gió giúp tăng cường phản xạ và cho phép họ di chuyển nhanh hơn.

name.jp: イブリスの不屈の精神

description.en: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.ar: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.br: Iblis é um reverenciado deus da apatia e neutralidade, e concede este buff aos jogadores, infundindo-os com uma explosão de energia vital que aumenta a saúde máxima e permite suportar mais danos.
description.cns: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.de: Iblis ist ein verehrter Gott der Apathie und Neutralität, der den Spielern diesen Buff gewährt, indem er sie mit einem Schub an Lebensenergie versorgt, der ihre maximale Gesundheit erhöht und sie in die Lage versetzt, mehr Schaden zu ertragen.
description.fi: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.fil: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.fr: Iblis est un dieu vénéré de l'apathie et de la neutralité, et il accorde ce buff aux joueurs en leur insufflant une bouffée d'énergie vitale qui augmente leur santé maximale et leur permet d'encaisser plus de dégâts.
description.id: Iblis adalah dewa sikap apatis dan netral yang dihormati, dan mereka memberikan buff ini kepada pemain dengan memberi mereka ledakan energi kehidupan yang meningkatkan max HP dan memungkinkan mereka menahan lebih banyak damage.
description.it: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.jp: イブリスは無関心と中立の崇拝された神であり、最大体力を増やし、より多くのダメージに耐えられるようにする生命エネルギーのバーストをプレイヤーに注入することで、このバフをプレイヤーに与えます。
description.kr: 이블리스는 무관심과 중립의 존경받는 신입니다. 엄청난 힘으로 플레이어의 최대 생명력을 끌어올려 공격을 더 오래 버틸 수 있는 버프를 부여합니다.
description.nl: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.pl: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.ru: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.sp: Iblis es un dios venerado de la apatía y la neutralidad, y otorga esta ventaja a los jugadores infundiéndoles una explosión de energía vital que aumenta su salud máxima y les permite resistir más daño.
description.sw: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
description.th: Iblis เป็นเทพแห่งความเฉยเมยและความเป็นกลาง และมอบบัฟนี้ให้กับผู้เล่นด้วยการเติมพลังชีวิตที่จะเพิ่มพลังชีวิตสูงสุดให้กับพวกเขา และทำให้พวกเขาสามารถทนทานต่อความเสียหายได้มากขึ้น
description.tw: 由敬仰之神伊普里司，賦予的生命祝福，提升最大生命值能承受更多傷害。
description.vi: Iblis là vị thần tôn nghiêm của sự lãnh đạm và trung lập, Người tăng sức mạnh này cho người chơi bằng cách truyền cho họ một nguồn năng lượng bùng nổ, giúp tăng sinh lực tối đa và cho phép người chơi chịu được nhiều sát thương hơn.

description.en: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.ar: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.br: Bubble é um lendário deus da alegria e pureza, e concede este buff aos jogadores, criando um poderoso escudo que proporciona uma camada extra de defesa contra ataques inimigos.
description.cns: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.de: Bubble ist ein legendärer Gott der Freude und der Reinheit. Er verleiht den Spielern diesen Buff, indem er einen mächtigen Schild erschafft, der eine zusätzliche Verteidigungsschicht gegen feindliche Angriffe bietet.
description.fi: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.fil: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.fr: Bubble est un dieu légendaire de la joie et de la pureté, et il accorde cet avantage aux joueurs en créant un puissant bouclier qui fournit une couche supplémentaire de défense contre les attaques ennemies.
description.id: Bubble adalah dewa kegembiraan dan kemurnian yang legendaris, dan mereka memberikan buff ini kepada pemain dengan menciptakan perisai kuat yang memberikan lapisan pertahanan ekstra terhadap serangan musuh.
description.it: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.jp: バブルは喜びと純粋さの伝説の神であり、敵の攻撃に対する防御層を追加する強力なシールドを作成することで、プレイヤーにこのバフを付与します。
description.kr: 버블은 기쁨과 순수의 전설적인 신입니다. 플레이어에게 강력한 방패를 생성하여 적 공격을 막아주는 추가 방어 버프를 부여합니다.
description.nl: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.pl: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.ru: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.sp: Burbuja es un dios legendario de la alegría y la pureza, y otorga este beneficio a los jugadores al crear un poderoso escudo que es una capa adicional de defensa contra los ataques enemigos.
description.sw: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
description.th: Bubble เป็นเทพเจ้าแห่งความสุขและความบริสุทธิ์ เขาจะมอบบัฟนี้ให้กับผู้เล่นด้วยการสร้างโล่อันแข็งแกร่งที่ให้การป้องกันชั้นพิเศษต่อการโจมตีของศัตรู
description.tw: 由喜悅之神巴布樂，賦予的強力護盾，提升防禦力以抵擋敵方傷害。
description.vi: Bubble là một vị thần huyền thoại của niềm vui và sự thuần khiết, Người ban tặng năng lực này cho người chơi bằng cách tạo ra một tấm khiên mạnh mẽ, giúp họ có thêm một lớp phòng thủ chống lại đòn tấn công của kẻ thù.

name.cns: 波卜尔的祝福 (波卜尔的祝福)
name.tw: 巴布樂祝福 (巴布樂祝福)

description.en: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.ar: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.br: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.cns: 施放一种光环：大幅降低自身移动速度，同时提升友军的移动速度、暴击伤害和攻击力。无法与其他光环同时使用。
description.de: Wirkt eine Aura, die die Bewegungsgeschwindigkeit des Zaubernden stark reduziert, während die Bewegungsgeschwindigkeit, kritischer Schaden und Angriff von Verbündeten erhöht werden. Kann nicht gleichzeitig mit anderen Auren verwendet werden.
description.fi: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.fil: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.fr: Lance une aura qui réduit fortement la vitesse du lanceur tout en augmentant l’attaque magique, les dégâts critiques et l’attaque des alliés. Ne peut pas être utilisée avec d’autres auras en même temps.
description.id: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.it: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.jp: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
description.kr: 사용자의 이동 속도가 대폭 감소하지만, 아군의 마법 공격력, 치명타 공격, 공격력이 증가하는 오라를 사용합니다. 다른 오라와 동시에 사용할 수 없습니다.
description.nl: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.

description.sp: Lanza un aura que reduce en gran medida la velocidad de movimiento del lanzador mientras aumenta la velocidad de movimiento, el daño crítico y el ataque de los aliados. No puede usarse junto con otras auras al mismo tiempo.
description.sw: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.

description.br: Monstros têm velocidade de ataque aumentada, mas têm uma taxa de drop maior.
description.cns: 所有怪物攻击速度增加，但掉率增加。
description.de: Monster greifen schneller an, haben aber eine höhere Drop-Rate.
description.fi: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.fil: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.fr: Les monstres attaquent plus rapidement, mais ont un butin augmenté.
description.id: Monster menyerang lebih cepat, tetapi memiliki tingkat penurunan lebih banyak.
description.it: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.jp: モンスターの攻撃は速くなりますが、ドロップ率は高くなります。
description.kr: 몬스터의 공격 속도가 빨라지지만 드롭 확률도 증가합니다.
description.nl: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.pl: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.ru: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.sp: Los monstruos atacan más rápido, pero tienen más tasa de caída.
description.sw: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
description.th: มอนสเตอร์โจมตีเร็วขึ้น แต่เพิ่มอัตราการดรอป
description.tw: 增加怪物的攻擊速度，但增加物品掉落率。
description.vi: Quái vật tấn công nhanh hơn, nhưng có tỷ lệ rơi nhiều hơn.

name.jp: シェードクリューバルゲイン

description.en: Monsters explode on death, but have an increased drop rate.
description.ar: Monsters explode on death, but have an increased drop rate.
description.br: Todos os monstros explodem ao morrer, mas têm uma taxa de drop maior.

description.fil: Monsters explode on death, but have an increased drop rate.

description.kr: 모든 몬스터가 죽으면서 폭발하지만 드롭 확률이 증가합니다.

description.pl: Monsters explode on death, but have an increased drop rate.
description.ru: Monsters explode on death, but have an increased drop rate.

description.th: มอนสเตอร์ทั้งหมดระเบิดตอนตาย แต่จะได้อัตราดรอปเพิ่มขึ้น
description.tw: 所有怪物死亡時會爆炸，但增加物品掉落率。
description.vi: Tất cả quái vật phát nổ khi chết, nhưng có tỷ lệ rơi nhiều hơn.

description.en: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
description.ar: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
description.br: Os monstros refletem dano, mas têm uma taxa de drop maior.
description.cns: 怪物们能够反弹伤害，但掉率提高。
description.de: Monster reflektieren Schaden, haben aber eine höhere Drop-Rate.
description.fi: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
description.fil: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.

description.id: Monster mencerminkan kerusakan, tetapi memiliki tingkat penurunan yang lebih tinggi.
description.it: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
description.jp: モンスターはダメージを反射しますが、ドロップ率は高くなります。
description.kr: 몬스터가 대미지를 반사하지만 드롭 확률이 증가합니다.
description.nl: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
description.pl: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
description.ru: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.

description.tw: 怪物擁有反彈傷害，但增加物品掉落率。
description.vi: Quái vật phản lại sát thương, nhưng có tỷ lệ rơi nhiều hơn.

description.en: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.ar: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.br: Uma porcentagem da vida dos monstros é recuperada a cada segundo, mas concedem mais experiência.
description.cns: 所有怪物都会不断回复一定百分比的生命值，但给予的经验增加。
description.de: Monster regenerieren einen bestimmten Prozentsatz ihrer Gesundheit pro Sekunde, geben aber mehr Erfahrung.
description.fi: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.fil: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.fr: Les monstres régénèrent un pourcentage de leur PV chaque seconde, mais donnent plus d'expérience.
description.id: Monster meregenerasi persentase kesehatannya per detik, tetapi memberi lebih banyak pengalaman.
description.it: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.jp: モンスターは毎秒体力の一定の割合を回復しますが、より多くの経験値を与えます。
description.kr: 몬스터가 초당 일정 비율의 생명력을 회복하지만, 경험치를 더 많이 줍니다.
description.nl: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.pl: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.ru: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.sp: Los monstruos regeneran un porcentaje de su salud por segundo, pero dan más experiencia.
description.sw: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
description.th: มอนสเตอร์ฟื้นพลังเป็นเปอร์เซ็นต์ของพลังพวกมันต่อวินาที แต่ให้ค่าประสบการณ์มากขึ้น
description.tw: 怪物每秒回復部分生命值，但可獲得更多經驗。
description.vi: Quái vật hồi phục một phần trăm sức khỏe mỗi giây, nhưng cho nhiều experience hơn.

description.en: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.ar: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.br: Esta entidade não morrerá até que o vínculo de vida do alvo esteja abaixo de um certo limite de pontos de vida.
description.cns: 该个体在目标生命连结低于某个HP阈值之前不会死亡。
description.de: Diese Entität stirbt erst, wenn der Lebenslink des Ziels unter eine bestimmte HP-Schwelle fällt.
description.fi: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.fil: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.fr: Cette entité ne peut pas mourir tant que la cible à laquelle elle est liée est au-dessus d'un certain seuil de PV.
description.id: Entitas ini tidak akan mati hingga target life link berada di bawah ambang batas HP tertentu.
description.it: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.jp: このエンティティは、ターゲットライフリンクが特定のHPしきい値を下回るまで死ぬことはありません。
description.kr: 이 존재는 연결된 대상의 HP가 일정 수준 이하로 떨어질 때까지 죽지 않습니다.
description.nl: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.pl: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.ru: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.sp: Esta entidad no morirá hasta que el eslabón de vida esté por debajo de un determinado umbral de PV.
description.sw: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
description.th: สิ่งนี้จะไม่ตายจนกว่าเป้าหมายของ life link จะมี HP ต่ำกว่าระดับนึง
description.tw: 此實體在連結目標的生命值高於特定門檻前不會死亡。
description.vi: Thực thể này sẽ không chết cho đến khi liên kết sự sống mục tiêu ở dưới ngưỡng HP nhất định.

description.en: Life-linked to another entity.
description.ar: Life-linked to another entity.
description.br: Há uma entidade com vínculo de vida a esta.
description.cns: 有一个个体和它有生命连结。

description.fi: Life-linked to another entity.
description.fil: Life-linked to another entity.
description.fr: Une entité est liée à celle-ci par un lien de vie.

description.it: Life-linked to another entity.
description.jp: これに関連するエンティティライフがあります。
description.kr: 이 몬스터와 연결된 존재가 있습니다.
description.nl: Life-linked to another entity.
description.pl: Life-linked to another entity.
description.ru: Life-linked to another entity.
description.sp: Hay una entidad de vida ligada a ésta.

description.th: มี life linked กับติดกับสิ่งนี้แล้ว
description.tw: 此實體的生命與另一個目標相連。
description.vi: Có một sự sống thực thể được liên kết với cái này.

description.en: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.
description.ar: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.
description.br: Recuperação acelerada de vida como resultado da fúria.
description.cns: 由于愤怒而迅速回复生命值。

description.fil: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.

description.id: Mempercepat pemulihan kesehatan sebagai akibat dari kemarahan.
description.it: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.

description.nl: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.
description.pl: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.
description.ru: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.
description.sp: Recuperación rápida de la salud como consecuencia de la rabia.

description.de: Den Gegner mit voller Konzentration angreifen. Der MP verbrauch liegt bei 100%
description.fi: A fully concentrated strike. Always consumes 100% MP.
description.fil: A fully concentrated strike. Always consumes 100% MP.
description.fr: Technique martiale millénaire qui utilise tous les PM du Moine pour délivrer un coup d'une extrême violence.
description.id: Serangan terkonsentrasi penuh. Selalu Mengkonsumsi 100% MP
description.it: A fully concentrated strike. Always consumes 100% MP.
description.jp: すべてのMPを破壊の力に変え、絶大なダメージを与えます。
description.kr: 적을 집중 타격합니다. 이때 MP는 모두 소모됩니다.
description.nl: A fully concentrated strike. Always consumes 100% MP.
description.pl: Atak wymagający pełnej koncentracji - konsumuje 100% MP by zadać olbrzymie obrażenia. Im więcej MP pochłonie, tym większe obrażenia.
description.ru: Могучий удар, требующий абсолютной сосредоточенности. Отнимает всю ману без остатка.
description.sp: Golpe totalmente concentrado. Consume el 100% MP.
description.sw: A fully concentrated strike. Always consumes 100% MP.
description.th: ใช้พลัง MP ที่มีอยู่ทั้งหมดโจมตี
description.tw: 全力集中的一擊。每次都會消耗 100% 魔力。
description.vi: 1 đòn đánh tập trung hoàn toàn. Luôn luôn tiêu hao 100% MP.

description.en: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.ar: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.br: Um ataque surpresa enquanto estiver usando a Ilusão Sombria.
description.cns: 从潜行状态下现身，给予对方致命一击，有一定几率造成双倍伤害。
description.de: Einen Überraschungsangriff aus der Dunkelheit starten. Dark Illusion wird benötigt.
description.fi: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.fil: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.fr: Attaque ultime qui libère un coup critique d'une rare violence sous l'effet de l'Illusion des ténèbres.
description.id: Serangan mendadak saat berada di Dark Illusion.
description.it: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.jp: ダークイリュージョンの状態でのみ使用でき、相手に不意打ちで攻撃を与えるスキル。
description.kr: 다크일루젼 상태에서 적을 기습합니다.
description.nl: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.pl: Atak z zaskoczenia, gdy jesteś w Dark Illusion.
description.ru: Внезапная атака, доступная только при использовании Иллюзии пустоты.
description.sp: Ataque sorpresa mientras estás bajo el efecto de Ilusión Oscura.
description.sw: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
description.th: ค่าโจมตีและคริติคอลจะเพิ่มขึ้นเป็น 2 เท่า ในขณะที่สกิล Dark ILLUSION ยังมีผลอยู่
description.tw: 在幻影術的狀態之下才可使用，有機率造成暴擊傷害。
description.vi: Tấn công đột ngột trong khi đang ở trong Dark Illusion

description.en: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.ar: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.br: Dispara três flechas de uma só vez, atordoando o alvo.
description.cns: 同时发射出三支弓箭，威力大大加强的攻击，并击晕目标。
description.de: Schießt drei Pfeile gleichzeitig. Betäubt das Ziel.
description.fi: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.fil: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.fr: Décoche trois flèches d'affilée, étourdissant l'ennemi sous la grande puissance de l'attaque.
description.id: Menembakkan tiga anak panah sekaligus. Stuns target.
description.it: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.jp: 3本の矢を一度に発射し、敵に強力なダメージを与え、弾き飛ばす
description.kr: 한번에 3발의 화살을 동시에 날려 공격 대상을 스턴 상태로 만듭니다.
description.nl: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.pl: Wystrzeliwuje trzy strzały na raz. Ogłusza cel.
description.ru: Выпускает сразу три стрелы. Имеет шанс оглушить противника.
description.sp: Dispara tres flechas a la vez. Aturde al objetivo.
description.sw: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
description.th: ยิงธนูออกไป 3 นัดซ้อน สร้างความมึนงงให้เป้าหมาย
description.tw: 一次發射三支箭矢，使目標暈眩。
description.vi: Bắn ba mũi tên cùng một lúc. Làm choáng mục tiêu.

description.en: Removes debuffs from the target.
description.ar: Removes debuffs from the target.
description.br: Remove qualquer efeito negativo do alvo.
description.cns: 移除施法对象的异常状态。
description.de: Entfernt alle negativen Effekte von einem Spieler.
description.fi: Poistaa kohteelta haittavaikutukset.
description.fil: Removes debuffs from the target.
description.fr: Guérit la cible de tous les effets négatifs qui l'affectent.
description.id: Menghapus de-buff dari target.
description.it: Removes debuffs from the target.
description.jp: 聖なる力で対象の状態異常を解除します。
description.kr: 대상에게 걸린 상태 이상을 회복시킵니다.
description.nl: Removes debuffs from the target.
description.pl: Usuwa klątwy z celu.
description.ru: Снимает с цели отрицательные эффекты.
description.sp: Elimina los de-buffs del objetivo.
description.sw: Removes debuffs from the target.
description.th: ปลดสถานะผิดปกติทุกชนิดออก
description.tw: 移除所有異常狀態。
description.vi: Loại bỏ trạng thái bất lợi khỏi mục tiêu.

description.en: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.ar: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.br: Aumenta todas as capacidades de curas recebidas e adquire imunidade a efeitos de controle de grupo, em troca da incapacidade de conjurar habilidades.
description.cns: 传承暴力技师英雄叙里的意志：免疫群体控制并提升即将到来的治疗量，代价是无法使用技能。
description.de: Werde immun gegen Crowd Control, verliere dafür aber die Fähigkeit, Fertigkeiten zu wirken, und erhalte mehr Heilung.
description.fi: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.fil: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.fr: Vous rend insensible aux effets négatifs et augmente vos soins reçus, mais vous empêche d'utiliser des compétences.
description.id: Menjadi kebal terhadap kontrol kerumunan dengan mengorbankan kemampuan Anda untuk mengeluarkan keterampilan, dan meningkatkan penyembuhan yang masuk.
description.it: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.jp: スキルを唱える能力を失い、入ってくる回復を増やすという犠牲を払って、群衆の制御に免疫を取ります。
description.kr: 스킬 시전이 봉인되지만 군중 제어에 면역력이 생기며, 받는 치유량도 증가합니다.
description.nl: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.pl: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.ru: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.sp: Vuélvete inmune al control de masas a costa de perder tu capacidad de lanzar habilidades y aumentar la curación entrante.
description.sw: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
description.th: ไม่ได้รับผลจาก crowd control แต่แลกมาด้วยที่ไม่สามารถใช้ Skill อะไรได้ และเพิ่มผลของการฮีลที่เข้ามา
description.tw: 傳承修利的意志進入免疫控制狀態，無法施放技能，並提高所受治療效果。
description.vi: Trở nên miễn nhiễm với sự kiểm soát của đám đông với cái giá là mất khả năng sử dụng kỹ năng và tăng khả năng hồi máu.

name.jp: レンディングエントリ

description.en: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.ar: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.br: Teletransporta para a posição do clique do cursor, causando dano aos inimigos próximos. Se um inimigo morrer por este ataque, o tempo de recarga de Entrada Dilacerante é redefinido.
description.cns: 传送到鼠标点击的位置，并对目的地附近敌人造成伤害，有几率使其减速。如果敌人死于该技能，冷却时间会被重置。
description.de: Teleportiere dich an die Position, auf die du mit dem Cursor klickst, und füge Feinden in der Nähe Schaden zu. Chance, den Feind zu verlangsamen. Wenn ein Feind durch diesen Angriff stirbt, wird die Abklingzeit von "Zerreißender Einbruch" zurückgesetzt.
description.fi: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.fil: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.fr: Vous téléporte à la position de votre curseur, et inflige des dégâts aux ennemis alentour avec une chance de les ralentir. Si un ennemi meurt par l'effet de cette compétence, elle se recharge immédiatement.
description.id: Teleport ke posisi klik kursor, memberikan damage pada musuh terdekat. Ada kesempatan memberikan status slow kepada musuh, jika musuh mati oleh serangan ini, cooldown Rending Entry akan direset.
description.it: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.jp: カーソルクリック位置にテレポートし、近くの敵にダメージを与えます。この攻撃で敵が死亡した場合、レンディングエントリーのクールダウンはリセットされます。
description.kr: 클릭한 위치로 텔레포트하여 주변의 적에게 대미지를 줍니다. 일정 확률로 적의 속도를 늦춥니다. 이 공격으로 적을 처치하면 거친 등장의 재사용 대기시간이 초기화됩니다.
description.nl: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.pl: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.ru: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.sp: Teletransportate a la posición de clic del cursor, causando daño a los enemigos cercanos. Posibilidad de ralentizar al enemigo. Si un enemigo muere a causa de este ataque, el tiempo de reutilización de Rending Entry se reinicia.
description.sw: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
description.th: เทเลพอร์ตตัวคุณไปยังตำแหน่งที่เลือก สร้างความเสียหายให้กับศัตรูรอบ ๆ มีโอกาสที่จะ Slow ศัตรู ถ้าศัตรูตายเพราะการจู่โจมนี้ Rending Entry คูลดาวน์จะถูกรีเซ็ต
description.tw: 瞬移至滑鼠點選位置，對周圍敵人造成傷害，並有機率使敵人定身。若敵人被此技能擊殺，技能冷卻時間將重置。
description.vi: Dịch chuyển tức thời đến vị trí nhấp chuột của con trỏ, gây sát thương cho kẻ thù ở gần. Cơ hội để làm chậm kẻ thù. Nếu kẻ thù chết vì đòn tấn công này, thời gian hồi chiêu cho Rending Entry sẽ được đặt lại.

description.en: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.ar: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.br: Invoca um tornado ao seu redor, empurrando inimigos próximos e criando uma barreira que impede aproximações.
description.cns: 在人物周围召唤出一个龙卷风，击退附近敌人并阻挡想要靠近的敌人。
description.de: Beschwöre einen Tornado um dich herum, der Feinde in der Nähe zurückdrängt und eine Barriere bildet, die verhindert, dass dich jemand erreicht.
description.fi: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.fil: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.fr: Invoque une tornade autour de vous, repoussant les ennemis proches et créant un bouclier qui empêche les gens de vous atteindre.
description.id: Panggil tornado di sekitar Anda, mendorong musuh di sekitar dan menciptakan penghalang yang menghalangi orang untuk mencapai Anda.
description.it: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.jp: 自分の周りに竜巻を召喚し、近くの敵を押し戻し、人々があなたに到達するのを妨げる障壁を作成します。
description.kr: 주위에 회오리를 소환하여, 주변의 적을 밀어내고 아무도 접근할 수 없게 보호막을 생성합니다.
description.nl: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.pl: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.ru: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.sp: Invoca un tornado a tu alrededor, haciendo retroceder a los enemigos cercanos y creando una barrera que impide que te alcancen.
description.sw: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
description.th: เรียกพายุหมุนมารอบตัวเอง ผลักศัตรูท่อยู่ใกล้ ๆ ออกไป และสร้างบาเรียเพื่อไม่ให้คนอื่นเข้ามาถึงตัวคุณได้
description.tw: 召喚龍捲風環繞自身，擊退周圍敵人，並產生防護屏障，使敵人無法靠近。
description.vi: Triệu tập một cơn lốc xoáy xung quanh bạn, đẩy lùi kẻ thù ở gần và tạo ra một rào cản ngăn mọi người tiếp cận bạn.

description.en: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.
description.ar: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.
description.br: Redireciona o dano recebido por um jogador alvo para si mesmo.
description.cns: 将目标玩家受到的部分伤害将转移到自身。
description.de: Leite den von einem Zielspieler erlittenen Schaden auf dich selbst um.
description.fi: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.
description.fil: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.
description.fr: Redirige vers vous les dégâts reçus par un joueur ciblé.
description.id: Alihkan kerusakan yang diambil dari pemain target ke diri Anda sendiri.
description.it: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.
description.jp: ターゲットプレイヤーから受けたダメージを自分にリダイレクトします。
description.kr: 대상 플레이어가 받은 대미지가 플레이어에게 돌아옵니다.
description.nl: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.

description.th: ย้ายความเสียหายที่ผู้เล่นเป้าหมายได้รับมาสู่ตัวคุณเอง
description.tw: 將目標玩家受到的傷害轉移到自己身上。
description.vi: Chuyển hướng sát thương nhận được từ người chơi mục tiêu sang chính bạn.

description.en: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.ar: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.br: Cria um poço gravitacional na posição do cursor que consideravelmente reduz a velocidade dos inimigos na área.
description.cns: 在鼠标指针位置创造一个能使敌人大幅减速的重力旋涡。
description.de: Erzeugt an der Position des Mauszeigers eine Schwerkraft-Quelle, die Feinde in diesem Bereich erheblich verlangsamt.
description.fi: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.fil: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.fr: Crée un puits gravitationnel à la position de votre curseur, qui ralentit considérablement les ennemis aux alentours.
description.id: Menciptakan gravitasi dengan baik pada posisi kursor Anda yang sangat memperlambat musuh di area tersebut.
description.it: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.jp: カーソル位置にグラビティウェルを生成し、エリア内の敵の速度を大幅に低下させます。
description.kr: 커서 위치에 중력 우물을 생성하여, 범위 내 적의 이동 속도를 현저히 낮춥니다.
description.nl: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.pl: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.ru: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.sp: Crea un pozo de gravedad en la posición del cursor que ralentiza a los enemigos de la zona.
description.sw: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
description.th: สร้าง Gravity Well ที่ตำแหน่งของเคอเซอร์ และลดความเร็วของศัตรูในบริเวณนั้นอย่างมาก
description.tw: 在滑鼠指向的位置生成一個深淵，大幅減緩區域內敵人的移動速度。
description.vi: Tạo ra một giếng trọng lực ở vị trí con trỏ của bạn làm chậm đáng kể kẻ thù trong khu vực.

description.en: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.ar: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.br: Ataque de longo alcance que envia uma onda de choque em uma área ao redor do alvo. Este ataque derruba inimigos ao redor do alvo afetado.
description.cns: 远距离射击，向目标周围区域发出冲击波并将敌人击飞。
description.de: Weitreichender Schuss, der eine Schockwelle in einem Gebiet um das Ziel herum aussendet. Dieser Angriff wirft Feinde um das betroffene Ziel herum zu Boden.
description.fi: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.fil: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.fr: Un coup à distance qui envoie une onde de choc dans une zone autour de la cible. Cette attaque assomme les ennemis autour de la cible.
description.id: Tembakan jarak jauh yang mengirimkan gelombang kejut di area sekitar target. Serangan ini menjatuhkan musuh di sekitar target yang terpengaruh.
description.it: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.jp: ターゲットの周囲に衝撃波を送る長距離ショット。この攻撃は、影響を受けたターゲットの周りの敵をノックダウンします。
description.kr: 원거리에서 대상 주변 지역에 충격파를 날립니다. 이 공격으로 대상 주변의 적을 쓰러뜨릴 수 있습니다.
description.nl: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.pl: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.ru: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.sp: Disparo de largo alcance que lanza una onda de choque en una zona alrededor del objetivo. Este ataque derriba a los enemigos alrededor del objetivo afectado.
description.sw: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
description.th: การยิงระยะไกลที่ส่งคลื่นกระแทกไปในบริเวณเป้าหมาย การโจมตีนี้ทำให้ศัตรูรอบ ๆ เป้าหมายล้มลง
description.tw: 發射遠程箭矢，並在命中目標周圍引發衝擊波，擊倒周圍敵人。
description.vi: Bắn tầm xa gửi sóng xung kích trong một khu vực xung quanh mục tiêu. Đòn tấn công này hạ gục kẻ thù xung quanh mục tiêu bị ảnh hưởng.

description.en: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.ar: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.br: O alvo irá bloquear o próximo ataque que receber, sem exceções.
description.cns: 目标玩家在短时间内受到的任何伤害降为0。
description.de: Das Ziel wird den nächsten Treffer auf jeden Fall blocken.
description.fi: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.fil: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.fr: La cible bloque le(s) prochain(s) coup(s) reçu(s), pendant la durée du buff.
description.id: Target akan memblokir pukulan masuk berikutnya apa pun yang terjadi.
description.it: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.jp: ターゲットは、何があっても次のインカミングヒットをブロックします。
description.kr: 대상이 다음에 받는 모든 공격을 막아냅니다.
description.nl: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.pl: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.ru: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.sp: El objetivo bloqueará el siguiente golpe entrante pase lo que pase.
description.sw: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
description.th: เป้าหมายจะบล็อคการโจมตีครั้งต่อไปไม่ว่าจะเกิดอะไรขึ้น
description.tw: 賦予目標屏障，在短時間內格擋所有受到的攻擊。
description.vi: Mục tiêu sẽ chặn cú đánh tiếp theo bất kể là gì.

description.en: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.ar: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.br: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.cns: 焚烧你的目标，造成伤害并使其灼烧。对已灼烧目标使用时，目标会受到额外伤害。被灼烧的敌人还会对附近敌人造成伤害，但不会使其灼烧。
description.de: Verbrenne dein Ziel, verursache Schaden und lasse es brennen. Bei Verwendung auf einem brennenden Ziel erleidet es zusätzlichen Schaden. Brennende Gegner verletzen auch nahe Gegner, lassen sie aber nicht brennen.
description.fi: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.fil: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.fr: Incinère ta cible, infligeant des dégâts et la brûlant. Si utilisé sur une cible déjà en feu, elle subit des dégâts supplémentaires. Les ennemis brûlés blessent aussi les ennemis proches, mais ne les enflamment pas.
description.id: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.it: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.jp: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.kr: 대상을 소각하여 피해를 주고 불태웁니다. 이미 불타고 있는 대상은 추가 피해를 받습니다. 불타는 적은 주변 적에게 피해를 주지만, 불태우지는 않습니다.
description.nl: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.pl: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.ru: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.sp: Incinera a tu objetivo, infligiendo daño y quemándolo. Si se usa sobre un objetivo en llamas, recibe daño adicional. Los enemigos en llamas también dañan a los cercanos, pero no los incendian.
description.sw: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.th: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.tw: 焚燒你的目標，造成傷害並使其灼燒。對已灼燒目標使用時，目標會受到額外傷害。被灼燒的敵人還會對附近敵人造成傷害，但不會使其灼燒。
description.vi: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.

description.en: Lock yourself in ice, becoming invulnerable and deal damage to surrounding enemies. You cannot use items or skills while frozen.
description.ar: Lock yourself in ice, becoming invulnerable and deal damage to surrounding enemies. You cannot use items or skills while frozen.
description.br: Lock yourself in ice, becoming invulnerable and deal damage to surrounding enemies. You cannot use items or skills while frozen.
description.cns: 将自己封锁在冰块中，进入无敌状态并对周围敌人造成伤害。冰封期间无法使用物品和技能。
description.de: Schließe dich in Eis ein, werde unverwundbar und verursache Schaden an umgebenden Gegnern. Du kannst keine Gegenstände oder Fähigkeiten verwenden, während du eingefroren bist.
description.fi: Lock yourself in ice, becoming invulnerable and deal damage to surrounding enemies. You cannot use items or skills while frozen.
description.fil: Lock yourself in ice, becoming invulnerable and deal damage to surrounding enemies. You cannot use items or skills while frozen.
description.fr: Emprisonnez-vous dans la glace, devenant invulnérable et infligeant des dégâts aux ennemis autour. Vous ne pouvez pas utiliser d’objets ou de compétences pendant que vous êtes gelé.

description.en: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.ar: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.br: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.cns: 在自身周围召唤狂风，提升移动速度并对附近敌人造成伤害。处于狂风状态时，你的攻击有几率施加窒息层数。当目标叠满 5 层窒息 时，会随机陷入眩晕、睡眠或麻痹。
description.de: Beschwöre einen Windstoß um dich herum, erhöhe deine Bewegungsgeschwindigkeit und verletze nahe Gegner. Während Gale haben Treffer eine Chance, Suffocate-Stapel anzuwenden. Wenn ein Ziel 5 Suffocate-Stapel erreicht, wird es zufällig betäubt, eingeschläfert oder gelähmt.
description.fi: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.fil: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.fr: Invoquez une bourrasque autour de vous, augmentant votre vitesse de déplacement et blessant les ennemis proches. Pendant la bourrasque, les coups peuvent appliquer des piles d’Étouffement. À 5 piles, la cible est étourdie, endormie ou paralysée au hasard.
description.id: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.kr: 주변에 질풍을 일으켜 이동 속도를 올리고 주변 적에게 피해를 줍니다. 질풍 상태에서 공격 적중 시 일정 확률로 질식이 중첩됩니다. 대상이 질식 5중첩에 도달하면 기절, 수면, 마비 효과 중 하나가 무작위로 발동합니다.
description.nl: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.sp: Invoca un vendaval a tu alrededor, aumentando tu velocidad de movimiento y dañando a los enemigos cercanos. Mientras está activo, los golpes tienen probabilidad de aplicar acumulaciones de asfixia. Si un objetivo alcanza 5 acumulaciones, queda aturdido, dormido o paralizado aleatoriamente.

description.vi: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.ar: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.cns: 在自身周围召唤狂风，提升移动速度并对附近敌人造成伤害。处于狂风状态时，你的攻击有几率施加窒息层数。当目标叠满 5 层窒息 时，会随机陷入眩晕、睡眠或麻痹。
description.de: Beschwöre einen Windstoß um dich herum, erhöhe deine Bewegungsgeschwindigkeit und verletze nahe Gegner. Während Gale haben Treffer eine Chance, Suffocate-Stapel anzuwenden. Wenn ein Ziel 5 Suffocate-Stapel erreicht, wird es zufällig betäubt, eingeschläfert oder gelähmt.
description.fi: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.fil: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
description.fr: Invoquez une bourrasque autour de vous, augmentant votre vitesse de déplacement et blessant les ennemis proches. Pendant la bourrasque, les coups peuvent appliquer des piles d’Étouffement. À 5 piles, la cible est étourdie, endormie ou paralysée au hasard.
description.id: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.kr: 주변에 질풍을 일으켜 이동 속도를 올리고 주변 적에게 피해를 줍니다. 질풍 상태에서 공격 적중 시 일정 확률로 질식이 중첩됩니다. 대상이 질식 5중첩에 도달하면 기절, 수면, 마비 효과 중 하나가 무작위로 발동합니다.
description.nl: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.sp: Invoca un vendaval a tu alrededor, aumentando tu velocidad de movimiento y dañando a los enemigos cercanos. Mientras está activo, los golpes tienen probabilidad de aplicar acumulaciones de asfixia. Si un objetivo alcanza 5 acumulaciones, queda aturdido, dormido o paralizado aleatoriamente.
description.sw: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.

description.tw: 在自身周圍召喚狂風，提升移動速度並對附近敵人造成傷害。處於狂風狀態時，你的攻擊有機率施加窒息層數。當目標疊滿 5 層窒息時，會隨機陷入眩暈、睡眠或麻痺。

description.en: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.ar: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.br: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.cns: 在指定区域召唤风暴云，周期性用闪电攻击附近敌人。闪电必定施加触电（Shock）效果；对已触电的目标造成最大伤害。
description.de: Werde von Gewitterwolken umgeben, die periodisch einen nahen Gegner mit Blitz treffen. Blitzschläge schocken Ziele immer. Schläge, die geschockte Ziele treffen, verursachen immer maximalen Schaden.
description.fi: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.fil: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.fr: Entourez-vous de nuages d’orage, frappant périodiquement un ennemi proche avec la foudre. Les frappes électrisent toujours les cibles. Les cibles électrisées subissent toujours les dégâts maximaux.
description.id: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.it: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.jp: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
description.kr: 주위에 폭풍 구름을 둘러 주기적으로 주변의 적에게 번개를 떨어뜨립니다. 번개는 항상 적을 감전시킵니다. 이미 감전된 적에게는 항상 최대 피해가 발생합니다.
description.nl: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.

description.sp: Invoca nubes de tormenta sobre un área, golpeando periódicamente a los enemigos cercanos con rayos. Los rayos siempre aplican electrocutado. Golpear a objetivos electrocutados inflige daño máximo.

description.en: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.ar: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.br: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.cns: 向前方发射根须，束缚命中的第一个敌人。若被束缚的敌人处于石柱或沼泽区域影响下，则会被石化：受到的魔法伤害提升、受到的物理伤害降低，并被眩晕。
description.de: Feuere eine Wurzel vor dir ab und fessle den ersten getroffenen Gegner. Wenn der gefesselte Gegner von Stone Pillar oder Swampy Area betroffen ist, wird er versteinert, was den magischen Schaden, den er erleidet, erhöht und den physischen Schaden, den er erleidet, reduziert und ihn betäubt.
description.fi: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.fil: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.fr: Projette une racine devant vous, liant le premier ennemi touché sur place. Si l’ennemi lié est affecté par Pilier de Pierre ou Zone Marécageuse, il est pétrifié, recevant plus de dégâts magiques, moins de dégâts physiques et est étourdi.
description.id: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.it: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.jp: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.kr: 전방으로 뿌리를 발사해 처음 적중한 적을 제자리에 속박합니다. 속박된 대상이 돌기둥 또는 늪지대의 영향을 받고 있다면, 대상이 석화되어 받는 마법 피해가 증가하고 물리 피해는 감소하며, 기절합니다.
description.nl: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.pl: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.ru: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.sp: Dispara una raíz frente a ti, inmovilizando al primer enemigo alcanzado. Si el enemigo afectado está bajo Pilar de piedra o Área pantanosa, queda petrificado, aumentando el daño mágico que recibe y reduciendo el daño físico recibido, además de aturdirlo.
description.sw: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.th: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
description.tw: 向前方發射根鬚，束縛命中的第一個敵人。若被束縛的敵人處於石柱或沼澤區域影響下，則會被石化：受到的魔法傷害提升、受到的物理傷害降低，並被眩暈。
description.vi: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.

description.en:
Attack your target, gaining Nen stacks. 

[Nen Enhancement]: This skill has a chance to knock the enemy down. If used during the duration of Force Grip, you will strike multiple times.

description.de:
Greife dein Ziel an und erhalte Nen-Stapel. 

[Nen-Verstärkung]: Diese Fähigkeit hat eine Chance, den Gegner niederzuschlagen. Wenn während der Dauer von Force Grip verwendet, wirst du mehrfach zuschlagen.

description.en: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.ar: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.br: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.cns: 进入隐身状态，并在原地生成一个分身。该分身将向随机方向移动，反弹所受伤害，并在消亡时爆炸。
description.de: Werde unsichtbar und erschaffe einen Klon an deiner Position, der in eine zufällige Richtung läuft, Schaden reflektiert und beim Tod explodiert.
description.fi: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.fil: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.fr: Deviens invisible et fais apparaître un clone à ta position qui court dans une direction aléatoire, reflète les dégâts et explose à sa mort.
description.id: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.it: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.jp: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.kr: 투명 상태가 되며 자신의 자리에 분신을 생성합니다. 분신은 무작위 방향으로 달리며 피해를 반사하고, 사망 시 폭발합니다.
description.nl: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.pl: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.ru: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.sp: Vuélvete invisible y crea un clon en tu posición que corre en una dirección aleatoria, refleja el daño y explota al morir.
description.sw: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.th: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
description.tw: 進入隱身狀態，並在原地生成一個分身。該分身將向隨機方向移動，反彈所受傷害，並在消亡時爆炸。
description.vi: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.

description.en: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.ar: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.br: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.cns: 以奇美拉之灵诅咒目标，对其造成伤害并将其变异为独眼蝙蝠。变异期间目标无法攻击。该技能在完全蓄力后，成功概率将提升30%。
description.de: Nutze Chimäras Geist, um dein Ziel zu verfluchen, Schaden zu verursachen und es in ein Aibatt zu verwandeln. Während der Verwandlung kann es nicht angreifen. Bei vollständiger Aufladung hat diese Fähigkeit eine 30% höhere Erfolgschance.
description.fi: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.fil: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.fr: Utilise l'esprit de Chimère pour maudire ta cible, infligeant des dégâts et la transformant en Aibatt. Pendant la mutation, elle ne peut pas attaquer. Lorsque la compétence est complètement chargée, le taux de réussite augmente de 30 %.
description.id: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.it: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.jp: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.kr: 키메라의 영을 이용해 대상을 저주하여, 피해를 주고 아이바트로 변이시킵니다. 변이된 대상은 공격할 수 없습니다. 최대 충전 시 공격력이 10% 증가합니다.
description.nl: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.pl: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.ru: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.sp: Usa el espíritu de la quimera para maldecir a tu objetivo, infligiendo daño y mutándolo en un Aibatt. Mientras esté mutado, no puede atacar. Cuando está completamente cargada, esta habilidad tiene un 30% más de probabilidad de éxito.
description.sw: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.th: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
description.tw: 以奇美拉之靈詛咒目標，對其造成傷害並將其變異為獨眼蝙蝠。變異期間目標無法攻擊。該技能在完全蓄力後，成功機率將提升 30%。
description.vi: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.

name.cns: 奇美拉的诅咒 (奇美拉的诅咒)
name.sp: Maldición de la Quimera (Maldición de la Quimera)

description.en: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.ar: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.br: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.cns: 对目标周围区域造成伤害，并有概率使被命中的敌人陷入诅咒状态，剥夺其发动暴击的能力。技能完全蓄力后，持续时间将延长，且攻击频率提高。
description.de: Verursache Schaden in einem Bereich um dein Ziel herum, mit einer Chance, getroffene Gegner zu verfluchen und ihnen die Fähigkeit zu kritischen Treffern zu nehmen. Bei vollständiger Aufladung wird die Fähigkeitsdauer erhöht und trifft häufiger.
description.fi: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.fil: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.fr: Inflige des dégâts dans une zone autour de ta cible, avec une chance de maudire les ennemis touchés, supprimant leur capacité à porter des coups critiques. Lorsque la compétence est complètement chargée, sa durée augmente et elle frappe plus fréquemment.
description.id: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.it: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.jp: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.kr: 대상의 주변에 광역 피해를 주며, 적중 시 일정 확률로 징크스를 부여해 치명타 공격을 봉인합니다. 최대 충전 시 지속시간이 증가합니다.
description.nl: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.pl: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.ru: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.sp: Inflige daño en un área alrededor de tu objetivo, con probabilidad de gafar a los enemigos alcanzados, eliminando su capacidad de asestar golpes críticos. Cuando está completamente cargada, la duración de la habilidad aumenta y golpea con mayor frecuencia.
description.sw: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.th: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
description.tw: 對目標周圍區域造成傷害，並有機率使被命中的敵人陷入詛咒狀態，剝奪其發動暴擊的能力。技能完全蓄力後，持續時間將延長，且攻擊頻率提高。
description.vi: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.

description.en: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.
description.ar: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.
description.br: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.
description.cns: 在目标区域短暂召唤西梅泰尔之灵，对周围敌人造成伤害并有概率施加沉默效果。
description.de: Beschwöre den Geist von Cimetiere für eine kurze Zeit im Zielbereich, verursache Schaden in der Umgebung mit einer Chance zu verstummen.
description.fi: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.
description.fil: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.

description.id: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.

description.jp: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.
description.kr: 대상 위치에 묘지의 영혼을 불러내 주변에 피해를 주며, 일정 확률로 침묵 효과를 적용합니다.
description.nl: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.

description.de: Stimme eine Hymne an, der nahen Verbündeten und dir selbst Schadensreduzierung gewährt. Während des Singens bricht die Verwendung anderer Fähigkeiten das Singen ab. Der Effekt der Hymne steigt, je länger du singst.

description.en: Curse your target with divine power, recording the highest hit taken and replicating up to 75% of it upon expiry. This debuff can be expired early if pressed again.

description.en: Swift piercing attack on a single target in a straight line. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 Stigma stacks, the attack will piercing all enemies.

description.br: Swift piercing attack on a single target in a straight line. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 Stigma stacks, the attack will piercing all enemies.
description.cns: 对直线上的单个目标发动迅捷穿刺攻击，施加一层烙印。若对拥有 5 层烙印的目标使用，该攻击会贯穿所有敌人。

description.en: Gain stacks of Undying, protecting you from going below 1 HP. If a stack is consumed, HP, FP, and MP are all reduced to 1. Once all stacks are consumed, you are no longer protected.
