description.en: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.ar: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.br: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.cns: 技能不再受体力加成，改为受智力加成。
description.de: Fähigkeit skaliert mit INT statt mit STA.
description.fi: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.fil: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.fr: La durée des compétences est proportionnelle à l'INT et non à l'END, avec une durée accrue, une pénalité réduite et une efficacité d'incantation améliorée à mesure qu'elles gagnent des niveaux.
description.id: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.it: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.jp: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.kr: 스킬이 STA 대신 INT에 비례합니다.
description.nl: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.pl: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.ru: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.sp: La duración de la habilidad escala con INT en lugar de STA, con mayor duración, menor penalización y mejor eficiencia de lanzamiento al subir de nivel.
description.sw: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.th: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
description.tw: 技能持續時間不再受體力加成，改為受智力加成，且持續時間增加、懲罰降低，並會隨等級提升改善施法效率。
description.vi: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.

description.en: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.ar: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.br: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.cns: 点燃目标，造成伤害并使其进入燃烧状态。若对已燃烧的目标使用，伤害会降低，但会眩晕目标。燃烧的敌人还会对附近敌人造成伤害，但不会使其燃烧。
description.de: Entzünde dein Ziel, verursache Schaden und lasse es brennen. Wenn auf ein brennendes Ziel verwendet, wird der Schaden reduziert, aber das Ziel wird betäubt. Brennende Gegner verletzen auch nahe Gegner, lassen sie aber nicht brennen.
description.fi: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.fil: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.fr: Enflamme votre cible, infligeant des dégâts et la brûlant. Sur une cible déjà en feu, les dégâts sont réduits mais elle est étourdie. Les ennemis brûlés blessent également les ennemis proches, sans les enflammer.
description.id: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.it: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.jp: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.kr: 대상을 점화하여 피해를 주고 불태웁니다. 이미 불타고 있는 대상에게 사용하면 피해가 감소하지만 대상이 기절합니다. 불타는 적은 주변 적에게 피해를 주지만, 불태우지는 않습니다.
description.nl: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.pl: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.ru: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.sp: Enciende a tu objetivo, infligiendo daño y quemándolo. Si se usa sobre un objetivo en llamas, el daño se reduce pero el objetivo queda aturdido. Los enemigos en llamas también dañan a los cercanos, pero no los incendian.
description.sw: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.th: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
description.tw: 點燃目標，造成傷害並使其進入燃燒狀態。若對已燃燒的目標使用，傷害會降低，但會眩暈目標。燃燒的敵人還會對附近敵人造成傷害，但不會使其燃燒。
description.vi: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.

description.en: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.ar: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.br: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.cns: 向目标发射一颗闪电球，可在附近敌人之间弹射。有概率对命中的敌人造成触电（Shock）。若命中已触电目标，则必定造成最大伤害。
description.de: Rufe eine Blitzkugel auf dein Ziel, die sich zu nahen Gegnern verkettet. Hat eine Chance, getroffene Gegner zu schocken. Wenn die Kugel ein geschocktes Ziel trifft, verursacht sie immer maximalen Schaden.
description.fi: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.fil: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.fr: Projette une boule de foudre sur votre cible, qui enchaîne sur les ennemis proches. Chance d’électrocuter les ennemis touchés. Si elle touche une cible électrocutée, les dégâts sont toujours maximaux.
description.id: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.it: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.jp: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.kr: 대상에게 전기 구체를 발사하며, 이 구체는 주변 적을 연쇄로 공격합니다. 적중 시 일정 확률로 적을 감전시킵니다. 구체가 감전된 적을 적중하면 항상 최대 피해가 발생합니다.
description.nl: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.pl: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.ru: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.sp: Invoca una esfera de rayo hacia tu objetivo que encadena a enemigos cercanos. Tiene probabilidad de electrocutar. Si golpea a un objetivo electrocutado, siempre inflige daño máximo.
description.sw: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.th: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
description.tw: 向目標發射一顆閃電球，可在附近敵人之間彈射。有機率對命中的敵人造成觸電。若命中已觸電目標，則必定造成最大傷害。
description.vi: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.

description.en: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.
description.ar: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.
description.br: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.
description.cns: 撕裂地面，召唤石柱攻击敌人并降低其移动速度。石柱持续时间结束后会爆炸，对附近敌人造成额外伤害。
description.de: Störe den Boden und beschwöre eine Steinsäule, die Gegner verletzt und ihre Bewegungsgeschwindigkeit senkt. Nach der Dauer der Säule explodiert sie und verursacht zusätzlichen Schaden an nahen Gegnern.
description.fi: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.
description.fil: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.
description.fr: Perturbe le sol, invoquant un pilier de pierre qui blesse les ennemis et réduit leur vitesse. À la fin de sa durée, il explose, infligeant des dégâts supplémentaires aux ennemis proches.
description.id: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.

description.kr: 지면을 뒤흔들고 돌기둥을 소환하여, 적에게 피해를 주고 적의 이동 속도를 감소시킵니다. 지속시간이 끝나면 돌기둥이 폭발해 근처 적에게 추가 피해를 줍니다.
description.nl: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.

description.sp: Perturba el suelo, invocando un pilar de piedra que daña a los enemigos y reduce su velocidad de movimiento. Al finalizar su duración, explota, infligiendo daño adicional.
description.sw: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.

description.en:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.ar:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.br:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.cns: 以重击攻击敌人。若目标处于倒地状态，则会向前突进快速拉近身位。[念气强化]：使用时获得韧性。
description.de:
Greife deinen Gegner mit einem Schlag an. Wenn das Ziel derzeit niedergeschlagen ist, wirst du nach vorne stürmen, um die Lücke schnell zu schließen. 

[Nen-Verstärkung]: Gewährt dir Zähigkeit bei Verwendung.
description.fi:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.fil:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.fr:
Attaque ton ennemi avec une frappe. Si la cible est renversée, tu avances rapidement pour réduire la distance. 

[Amélioration Nen] : Confère de la ténacité à l’utilisation.

description.sw: Target's movement speed is reduced.
description.th: Target's movement speed is reduced.
description.tw: 目標的移動速度降低。
description.vi: Target's movement speed is reduced.

description.en:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.ar:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.br:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.cns: 以重击攻击敌人。若目标处于倒地状态，则会向前突进快速拉近身位。[念气强化]：使用时获得韧性。
description.de:
Greife deinen Gegner mit einem Schlag an. Wenn das Ziel derzeit niedergeschlagen ist, wirst du nach vorne stürmen, um die Lücke schnell zu schließen. 

[Nen-Verstärkung]: Gewährt dir Zähigkeit bei Verwendung.
description.fi:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.fil:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.fr:
Attaque ton ennemi avec une frappe. Si la cible est renversée, tu avances rapidement pour réduire la distance. 

[Amélioration Nen] : Confère de la ténacité à l’utilisation.
description.id:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.it:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.jp:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.kr:
타격으로 적을 공격합니다. 대상이 쓰러진 상태라면 빠르게 돌진해 거리를 좁힙니다.

[기 강화]: 사용 시 강인함을 얻습니다.
description.nl:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.pl:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.ru:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.sp:
Ataca a tu enemigo con un golpe. Si el objetivo está derribado, te lanzarás hacia adelante para cerrar la distancia rápidamente. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Te otorga tenacidad al usarla.
description.sw:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.th:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
description.tw:
以重擊攻擊敵人。若目標處於倒地狀態，則會向前突進快速拉近身位。

[念氣強化]：使用時獲得不屈。
description.vi:
Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.

description.en:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.ar:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.br:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.cns: 抓住目标，束缚自身与目标，使其无法移动、攻击或使用技能。[念气强化]：束缚目标时可使用技能。
description.de:
Ergreife das Ziel und hindere euch beide daran, euch zu bewegen, anzugreifen oder Fähigkeiten zu verwenden. 

[Nen-Verstärkung]: Erlaubt Fähigkeitsnutzung während das Ziel festgehalten wird.
description.fi:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.fil:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.fr:
Saisis la cible, immobilisant tous les deux et empêchant de bouger, attaquer ou utiliser des compétences. 

[Amélioration Nen] : Permet d’utiliser des compétences tout en retenant la cible.
description.id:

description.kr:
대상을 붙잡고 제압하여, 둘 다 이동, 공격, 스킬 사용이 차단됩니다. 

[기 강화]: 대상 제압 중에도 스킬을 사용할 수 있습니다.

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.ar:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.br:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.cns: 抓住目标，束缚自身与目标，使其无法移动、攻击或使用技能。[念气强化]：束缚目标时可使用技能。
description.de:
Ergreife das Ziel und hindere euch beide daran, euch zu bewegen, anzugreifen oder Fähigkeiten zu verwenden. 

[Nen-Verstärkung]: Erlaubt Fähigkeitsnutzung während das Ziel festgehalten wird.
description.fi:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.fil:
Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. 

[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
description.fr:
Saisis la cible, immobilisant tous les deux et empêchant de bouger, attaquer ou utiliser des compétences. 

[Amélioration Nen] : Permet d’utiliser des compétences tout en retenant la cible.

description.en: Channel energy from your surroundings for a long period of time, and target it towards a selected area for great damage.

description.en: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with elemental resistance. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
description.ar: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with elemental resistance. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
description.br: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with elemental resistance. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
description.cns: 吟唱圣歌，为周围友方及自身提供元素抗性。吟唱期间使用其他技能将中断吟唱。圣歌的效果随持续吟唱时间逐步增强。
description.de: Stimme eine Hymne an, der nahen Verbündeten und dir selbst Elementarresistenz gewährt. Während des Singens bricht die Verwendung anderer Fähigkeiten das Singen ab. Der Effekt der Hymne steigt, je länger du singst.
description.fi: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with elemental resistance. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
description.fil: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with elemental resistance. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
description.fr: Chante un hymne qui accorde à toi et tes alliés proches une résistance élémentaire. Utiliser d’autres compétences interrompt le chant. L’effet de l’hymne augmente au fur et à mesure que tu continues de chanter.

description.en: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.ar: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.br: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.cns: 向目标释放救赎气息，对其进行治疗；若目标为友方，治疗效果将流转至附近其他友方目标；若目标为敌方，则转为造成伤害。
description.de: Hauche den Fluss der Erlösung in dein Ziel, heile es und fließe zu nahen Zielen, wenn sie Verbündete sind, oder verursache andernfalls Schaden.
description.fi: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.fil: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.fr: Insuffle le Flot de Rédemption dans ta cible, la guérissant et se propageant aux cibles proches si ce sont des alliés, ou infligeant des dégâts sinon.
description.id: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.it: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.jp: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.kr: 대상에게 구원의 흐름을 불어넣어, 아군이라면 치유한 후 주변 아군에게도 치유를 옮기고 적이라면 피해를 줍니다.
description.nl: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.pl: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.ru: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.sp: Insufla el flujo de salvación en tu objetivo, curándolo y extendiéndose a objetivos cercanos si son aliados, o infligiendo daño en caso contrario.
description.sw: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.th: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
description.tw: 向目標釋放救贖氣息，對其進行治療；若目標為友方，治療效果將流轉至附近其他友方目標；若目標為敵方，則轉為造成傷害。
description.vi: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.

description.fr: Charge ton sang et frappe le sol, blessant et faisant saigner les ennemis proches. Les frappes pleinement chargées infligent des coups supplémentaires.

description.kr: 피를 충전하고 지면에서 발을 굴러 주변 적에게 피해 및 출혈을 줍니다. 완전히 충전한 발 구르기는 추가 타격을 가합니다.

description.en: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.
description.ar: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.
description.br: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.
description.cns: 对目标发动下段攻击。若此次攻击将目标击倒，则可立即重新施放该技能，且造成伤害提升。
description.de: Führe einen Unterkörper-Schlag auf das Ziel aus. Wenn das Ziel durch den Schlag niedergeschlagen wird, kann er erneut gewirkt werden und verursacht erhöhten Schaden.
description.fi: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.
description.fil: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.
description.fr: Effectue une frappe sur la partie basse de la cible. Si la cible est renversée par la frappe, elle peut être relancée, infligeant des dégâts accrus.
description.id: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.

description.kr: 대상에게 하단 공격을 가합니다. 이 공격으로 적이 넘어지면 스킬을 다시 사용할 수 있으며, 재사용 시 피해가 증가합니다.

description.tw: 對目標發動下段攻擊。若此次攻擊將目標擊倒，則可立即重新施放該技能，且造成傷害提升。

description.en: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.ar: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.br: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.cns: 向目标发射锁链刀刃，将其束缚，持续旋转攻击周围敌人，随后锁链会连接至附近另一目标。有几率施加一层烙印。若对拥有5 层烙印的目标使用，攻击时会吸取生命值。
description.de: Schleudere eine Klingenkette auf dein Ziel, die sich an ihm festbindet, sich dreht und Gegner um es herum angreift, dann zu einem anderen nahen Ziel übergeht. Hat eine Chance, einen Stigma-Stapel anzuwenden. Wenn auf ein Ziel mit 5 Stapeln verwendet, wird HP durch Treffer gestohlen.
description.fi: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.fil: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.fr: Lance une chaîne de lames vers votre cible qui s’y fixe, attaque les ennemis autour et enchaîne sur une autre cible proche. Possibilité d’appliquer une pile de Stigmate. Sur une cible avec 5 piles, vole des PV via les coups.

Tiene probabilidad de aplicar una acumulación de Estigma. Si se usa sobre un objetivo con 5 acumulaciones, robará HP con los golpes.

description.sp: Lanza una cadena de cuchillas hacia tu objetivo que se adhieren a él, giran y atacan a los enemigos a su alrededor, luego saltan a otro objetivo cercano. Tiene probabilidad de aplicar una acumulación de Estigma. Si se usa sobre un objetivo con 5 acumulaciones, robará HP con los golpes.
description.sw: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.th: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
description.tw: 向目標發射鎖鏈刀刃，將其束縛，持續旋轉攻擊周圍敵人，隨後鎖鏈會連線至附近另一目標。有機率施加一層刃印。若對擁有 5 層刃印的目標使用，攻擊時會吸取生命值。
description.vi: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.

description.en: A blast of hellfire shoots in front of you, dealing tick damage while burning enemies in the line of fire.

description.en: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.
description.ar: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.
description.br: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.
description.cns: 移除目标身上的若干控制与虚弱减益效果，移除数量取决于【邪能爆裂】与【诅咒奔涌】的当前叠层数。此技能将消耗上述两种技能的所有叠层，其伤害随你身上的减益与虚弱效果强度提升。
description.de: Entferne eine Anzahl von Disable- und Schwächungs-Debuffs von deinem Ziel bis zur Anzahl verfügbarer Malefic Detonation- und Damnation Surge-Stapel. Diese Fähigkeit verbraucht alle Stapel beider Fähigkeiten. Der Schaden dieser Fähigkeit skaliert mit Debuff- und Schwächungseffekten auf dir.
description.fi: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.
description.fil: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.
description.fr: Supprime un certain nombre de débuffs Désactiver et Affaiblir de ta cible jusqu'au nombre d'accumulations de Détonation Maléfique et Vague de Damnation disponibles. Cette compétence consomme toutes les accumulations des deux compétences. Les dégâts de cette compétence sont proportionnels aux effets de Débuff et Affaiblir sur toi.
description.id: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.

description.kr: 현재 보유한 재앙의 폭발과 파멸의 분출 중첩 수만큼 대상에게 걸려 있는 제어와 약화 디버프를 제거합니다. 사용 시 두 스킬의 중첩이 모두 소모됩니다.
description.nl: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.

Esta habilidad consume todas las acumulaciones de ambas habilidades. El daño de esta habilidad escala con los efectos de deshabilitación y debilitamiento sobre ti.

description.en: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with increased evasion and blocking power. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.

description.de: Stimme eine Hymne an, der nahen Verbündeten und dir selbst erhöhte Ausweich- und Blockkraft gewährt. Während des Singens bricht die Verwendung anderer Fähigkeiten das Singen ab. Der Effekt der Hymne steigt, je länger du singst.

description.en: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
description.ar: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
description.br: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
description.cns: 双持武器猛击目标，对其周围造成伤害，并施加一层烙印。若对拥有 5 层烙印的目标使用，会使其沉默。
description.de: Schlage mit beiden Waffen auf das Ziel ein und verursache Schaden um es herum. Wendet einen Stigma-Stapel an. Wenn auf ein Ziel mit 5 Stigma-Stapeln verwendet, wird es zum Schweigen gebracht.
description.fi: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
description.fil: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
description.fr: Abats-toi sur la cible avec tes deux armes, infligeant des dégâts autour. Applique une pile de Stigmate. Sur une cible avec 5 piles, elle sera réduite au silence.
description.id: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
